# S003 Actor Aliases

Use these aliases when scenario prose and workspace folder names differ.

| Scenario Name | Workspace Folder |
| --- | --- |
| `agent-user` | `actors/agent-user` |
| `c03-catalog` | `components/c03-service-catalog` |
| `c04-gateway` | `components/c04-agent-tool-gateway` |
| `c05-jobs` | `components/c05-async-job-service` |
| `c06-leases` | `components/c06-resource-lease-service` |
| `c07-artifact-store` | `components/c07-artifact-store` |
| `c08-policy` | `components/c08-access-policy-and-secrets` |
| `c09-linux-gpu-node` | `components/c09-runtime-node-agent` |
| `c10-comfyui-provider` | `components/c10-comfyui-provider` |
| `composition-runner` | `runners/composition-runner` |
